title: cynoglossum barbaricinum
intro: Cynoglossum barbaricinum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or wolf's milk, is a plant species belonging to the borage family that grows in mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum barbaricinum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential in treating various infectious diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have various therapeutic effects when consumed.
